message:
feat(patterns): add operational telemetry counters to PatternEngine [ft-3kxe.9]

Add PatternTelemetry with AtomicU64 counters for lock-free concurrent
access: scans_total, matches_total, quick_rejects, bloom_checks,
bloom_positives, bloom_rejects, candidate_rules_evaluated,
regex_evaluations. Wire into detect(), quick_reject_with_index(), and
detect_with_context_and_trace(). Add PatternTelemetrySnapshot
(Serialize/Deserialize) for pipeline export.

Proptest suite validates monotonicity, serde roundtrip, and
regex_evaluations <= candidate_rules_evaluated invariant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
